response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong seniority, architectural thinking, and mentoring capabilities exceeding typical expectations, the role requires core C++ and systems programming expertise that is fundamentally misaligned with his background. His professional experience spans 20+ years primarily in web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), with C++ work limited to a junior role in 2007–2008. The position demands modern C++ with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, and industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443); he has none of these as practiced skills. His lack of industrial automation or IoT domain experience and absence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices further compounds the mismatch. This would require a significant career pivot rather than a lateral move.
strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement with 20+ years of experience and proven track record in architectural design, mentoring, and cross-functional collaboration across distributed systems
Demonstrates strong agile methodology experience (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and exceptional ability to communicate and transfer knowledge through workshops and public talks
Has shipped commercial products at scale (millions of requests per second, Apple TV top-10 app) and built event-driven platforms, showing systems-thinking beyond typical web development
concerns: Minimal C++ expertise: last meaningful C++ work was in 2007–2008 (18 years ago) with basic LabWindows components; current skill set is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript and web technologies, not systems programming
Zero experience in industrial automation, manufacturing, IoT, or the specialized protocols required (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, IEC 104, DNP 3.0, OPC UA); domain knowledge is absent
No demonstrated knowledge of Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL), IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards, or secure industrial coding practices—all core to the role's responsibility matrix

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and embedded systems domain
Senior architectural thinking and team mentorship
